summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StudyBoard new features (templates, stats, search/filter, profile). Backend APIs 100% successful. Frontend features working with minor session management observations.

design_issues.issue: Profile page stats may not be consistently visible due to data dependency

session_management.issue: Sessions expire quickly during extended testing, redirects to auth page

passed_tests: Backend: All 5 templates returned from GET /api/templates
Backend: Board creation from template with pre-filled cards via POST /api/boards/from-template
Backend: Stats API returning all required fields via GET /api/stats
Backend: Profile GET and PUT operations working correctly
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats cards and progress bar
Frontend: Template creation dialog shows 5 templates
Frontend: Template boards create with pre-filled content
Frontend: Search functionality filters cards by title/tags
Frontend: Priority filter dropdown works correctly
Frontend: Profile page loads and allows name editing
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works on all pages
Frontend: Card CRUD operations (create, read, update)
Frontend: Board navigation and UI responsiveness
Backend: Auth registration, login, session management
Backend: Board, list, card CRUD operations
Backend: Card move operations between lists

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor session timeout issues during extended testing)
